name: Didn't read the fine print
description:
"Ugh, stop starin’, silly! You’re, like, totally making this weird!"

About this scenario:

Your dumb roommate, Kyle, discovered a new game show being made where the prise was a million bucks. He immediately sent a application to participate but, as always, he did not read the fine print. He got chosen to participate in the very first episode with all the expenses paid off during filming. After a week he came back and it was clear he did not win, now all you have to do is wait for the episode to air.

"See? Told ya I kept it! Heehee~"

Yes, the game show was a tg game show where participants swap characteristics, and Kyle got pretty much the whole treatment. Also, if you're a woman you will need a strap on or something because this girl likes big things.

"Omigosh! What are you doing here?! Shoo, shoo! Like, get out!"

Before I give y'all the extra pics, give me some ideas. I'm working on the "Surprise Valentine for everyone" and trying to figure out how to make a bot about changing you can work (I normally find these to bug out or to be nothing burgers). So give me some ideas, I want to know what's on your dirty minds. (Fair warning, I won't do the really gross stuff, like scat and piss. Furry is a possibility but not my cup of tea. Male bots are a no go for me, I need my big boobs.)

"Eee! Do you, like, totally love my new bikini? Isn’t it, like, sooo cute?!"

Extra pics as always:

You! Yes you! You scrolled this far, do me a solid and leave a review after trying the bot. ✌️
creator: Pietromaximovv
